top_signals.title: Optimum Pushes Apollo, Ares Feud to Brink With Asset Shift
top_signals.summary: One of the most bitter feuds in distressed-debt investing, between billionaire Patrick Drahi and some of the world’s biggest money managers, has suddenly gotten even more contentious.

top_signals.title: Canadian Stocks Index Hits 35,000 Amid Rally in Energy
top_signals.summary: The Canadian equities benchmark passed 35,000 for the first time on a broadening rally in energy and financials.
